mapper.sql: select pd.id, pd.project_id, pd.name, pd.description, pd.remark, pd.created_by, su.nick_name, pd.created_time, pd.updated_time from p_document pd left join sys_user su on pd.created_by = su.user_id
mapper.insert:
insert into p_document
project_id, name, description, remark, created_by, created_time, updated_time,
#{projectId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{remark}, #{createdBy}, #{createdTime}, #{updatedTime},
mapper.select:
SELECT pd.id, pd.project_id, pd.name, pd.description, pd.remark, (SELECT version_number FROM p_document_version WHERE document_id = pd.id ORDER BY upload_time DESC LIMIT 1) as version, (SELECT file_path FROM p_document_version WHERE document_id = pd.id ORDER BY upload_time DESC LIMIT 1) as file_path, (SELECT file_name FROM p_document_version WHERE document_id = pd.id ORDER BY upload_time DESC LIMIT 1) as file_name, pd.created_by, su.nick_name, pd.created_time, pd.updated_time FROM p_document pd INNER JOIN ( SELECT name, MAX(created_time) as max_created_time FROM p_document
and project_id = #{projectId} and name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
GROUP BY name ) latest ON pd.name = latest.name AND pd.created_time = latest.max_created_time LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON pd.created_by = su.user_id
and pd.project_id = #{projectId} and pd.name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
ORDER BY pd.created_time DESC
mapper.delete:
delete from p_document where id in
#{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT pd.id, pd.project_id, pj.name as project_name, pj.code as project_code, pd.name, pd.description, pd.remark, (SELECT version_number FROM p_document_version WHERE document_id = pd.id ORDER BY upload_time DESC LIMIT 1) as version, (SELECT attachment_id FROM p_document_version WHERE document_id = pd.id ORDER BY upload_time DESC LIMIT 1) as attachment_id, (SELECT file_path FROM p_document_version WHERE document_id = pd.id ORDER BY upload_time DESC LIMIT 1) as file_path, (SELECT file_name FROM p_document_version WHERE document_id = pd.id ORDER BY upload_time DESC LIMIT 1) as file_name, pd.created_by, su.nick_name, pd.created_time, pd.updated_time FROM p_document pd INNER JOIN ( SELECT name, MAX(created_time) as max_created_time FROM p_document
and name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
GROUP BY name ) latest ON pd.name = latest.name AND pd.created_time = latest.max_created_time LEFT JOIN p_project pj ON pd.project_id = pj.id LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON pd.created_by = su.user_id
and pd.name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
ORDER BY pd.created_time DESC
